concerns.text: No task is explicitly linked to Functional Requirement FR-003 (CPU‑only MPNN implementation with device check). Existing tasks (e.g., T016) implement the model but lack a [FR-003] tag or explicit verification step.
Phase 0 (Data Acquisition & Validation) is described in the implementation plan but there are no tasks assigned to it in tasks.md, leaving the critical data‑acquisition step unimplemented.

Success Criterion SC-003 (total pipeline runtime measurement) is not covered by any task. The monitor task T006 enforces a runtime limit but does not record or report the actual total runtime as required.
Success Criterion SC-005 (peak memory usage measurement) is not covered by any task. No task logs or reports memory consumption during featurization or training.

Success Criterion SC-001 (reporting Pearson r against the r > 0.7 threshold) is not explicitly linked to any task. While T021 performs a t‑test, it does not state that the r threshold must be evaluated and reported.
Success Criterion SC-004 (stability of correlation across sensitivity analysis) lacks an explicit task. The sensitivity sweep tasks (T024, T042, T043) generate reports but do not reference SC-004.
